title: teucrium chamaedrys subsp. chamaedrys
intro: Teucrium chamaedrys subsp. chamaedrys, also known as the Woodland Germander or Hedge Hyssop, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Woodland Germander include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
